title: Nagel Institute Fellowship

title: McGregor Undergraduate Research Fellowship
description: Awarded a McGregor Undergraduate Research Fellowship at Calvin University, supporting collaborative faculty-student research.

title: Baylor Symposium on Faith & Culture 2026
